name: The Epic Walk-Up
vibe: Driving, massive, melancholic alternative rock backbone.

name: The Bleak Modal Loop
vibe: Bleak, cold, and hypnotic; strips out classical major resolutions.

name: The Brooding Valley
vibe: Brooding, slow, and moody; ideal for sustained, dragging verses.

name: The Ethereal Shimmer
vibe: Bittersweet, nostalgic shoegaze or dream-pop lift.

name: The Cinematic Rise
vibe: Step from dark valley paths into a vast major key clearing.

name: The Tension Wave
vibe: Utilizes a major V chord for extreme chromatic tension.
